response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer, but his profile does not match this role's mandatory requirements. His professional C++ experience amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. His database experience is MySQL and MongoDB rather than SQL Server or Oracle, and he has no fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets exposure — RIDE Capital was a retail investment fintech, not an investment banking environment. His systems-level work in DLang shows transferable low-latency skills, but the core stack and domain gaps are too large for a consulting engagement expecting immediate productivity.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, desktop, and embedded systems
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (DLang microservices handling millions of requests per second)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and testing tooling authorship
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, roughly a decade ago — far below the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MySQL and MongoDB
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets / investment banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: Missing fixed income / capital markets domain
